login(LoginRequestDto) - Method in class jpa.controllers.AuthController
Authenticates a user and returns an access/refresh token pair.
login(LoginRequestDto) - Method in class jpa.services.impl.AuthServiceImpl
Authenticates a user and issues a token pair.
login(LoginRequestDto) - Method in interface jpa.services.interfaces.AuthService
Authenticates a user and issues a token pair.
LoginRequestDto - Record Class in jpa.dto.auth
Request payload used to authenticate a user with email and password.
LoginRequestDto(String, String) - Constructor for record class jpa.dto.auth.LoginRequestDto
Creates an instance of a LoginRequestDto record class.
logout(String, RefreshTokenRequestDto) - Method in class jpa.controllers.AuthController
Revokes the provided refresh token and closes the current session.
logout(RefreshTokenRequestDto) - Method in class jpa.services.impl.AuthServiceImpl
Revokes the provided refresh token to terminate the current session.
logout(RefreshTokenRequestDto) - Method in interface jpa.services.interfaces.AuthService
Revokes the provided refresh token to terminate the current session.
